notFound.title: This tournament doesn't exist
notFound.body: The link may have been copied incorrectly, or the tournament isn't published yet. Ask the organiser to send it again.

offline.title: No connection
offline.body: We couldn't load the tournament. Check your connection and try again.

serverError.title: The tournament couldn't be loaded
serverError.body: The server failed, not your connection. Try again in a few seconds.

placeholder.title: The draw goes here
placeholder.body: This public page is built in milestone 4.
